title: School of Football | The Ghost Rabona | Boston Dynamics x Hyundai
summary:
Atlas reveals the Ghost Rabona.

Atlas takes the Rabona further combining precision, control, and deception.

Pushing the limits of movement, Atlas unlocks new possibilities in robotics through football.
